en: Or, you could not eat the cornballs and let your kid lead his own life.
ko: 아니면, 옥수수볼을 먹지 말고 아이가 자신의 삶을 살게 할 수도 있어.

en: Please. He loves this, am I right?
Actually, uh, I can't really go today. How's that?
My bike needs a tune-up or something.
Let's not blame the bike, okay?
It's the poor carpenter that blames his shoddy tools for the... Ow!
ko: 형편없는 도구 탓하는 건 가난한 목수뿐이야... 아야!

en: Jesus Christ!
Ugh! Stupid cornballing piece of s***!
So I'm gonna go, okay?
Yeah, yeah, it's fine.
It's good. It's okay. Have fun.
Getting too old for his daddy?
No. He'll be fine.
And I would buy him a faster bike if we weren't trying to save every...
ko: 매일 아끼고 있지 않았다면 더 빠른 자전거를 사줬을 텐데.

en: Did you go shopping?
Oh yeah, don't worry about it.
I paid for it myself. With what?
Company credit card. You're returning that? Thanks!
ko: 회사 신용카드로. 그거 반납할 거야? 고마워!

en: Michael? Hey, the cornballer!
I thought these things were only legal in Mexico.
In fact, the cornballer wasn't legal in Mexico.
ko: 사실, 이 옥수수볼 기계는 멕시코에서도 합법이 아니었어.
